final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 5'b00001; // initialize to 00001
        end else begin
            out <= {out[3:0], out[4]}; // shift left and wrap around
        end
    end
endmodule
